query:
INSERT INTO macro_signals (signal_type, title, summary, rory_pitch, impacted_asset_classes, recommended_action, confidence_score, source_url, direction, magnitude, time_horizon_months, affected_naics, affected_geography, active_from, created_at)
VALUES
(
  'macro_momentum',
  'CNY Revaluation — USD/CNY Target 6.50',
  'Goldman Sachs May 2026 forecast: CNY 20% undervalued, USD/CNY target 6.50 within 12 months. Creates structural cost advantage for Mexican and Canadian service businesses serving Chinese-tenant industrial clusters.',
  'The dollar is overvalued against the yuan by 20%. That gap closes in 12 months. Every service business near a Chinese-tenant industrial park in Nuevo León or GTA just got a hidden tailwind baked into their cost structure.',
  '["trade_services","commercial_real_estate","logistics"]',
  'Prioritize Tier 2 (Northern Mexico) and Tier 3 (GTA/Vancouver) geographic targets in Continental Keystone pipeline. Flag HVAC/electrical deals reliant on Chinese-origin components as headwind exposure.',
  0.78,
  'https://www.goldmansachs.com/insights/pages/fx-outlook-2026.html',
  'tailwind',
  8,
  12,
  '["238220","238210","484121","561720"]',
  '["Nuevo León, MX","Coahuila, MX","GTA, CA","Vancouver, CA"]',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'government',
  'Canada-China EV Agreement — Tariff Cut to 6.1%',
  'January 2026: Canada reduced EV tariffs on Chinese vehicles from 100% to 6.1%, with a 49K vehicle quota and JV manufacturing mandate within 3 years. Creates demand surge for EV service infrastructure, commercial real estate, and customs brokerage on China-Canada lanes.',
  'Canada just opened the door to 49,000 Chinese EVs a year. The charging infrastructure, the service centers, the commercial real estate around the ports — that supply chain is being built right now.',
  '["commercial_real_estate","ev_infrastructure","logistics"]',
  'Scan for commercial service businesses within 50 miles of major Canadian ports (Vancouver, Halifax). Flag EV-adjacent HVAC and electrical contractors for Tier 3 pipeline.',
  0.85,
  'https://www.canada.ca/en/department-finance/news/2026/01/canada-china-ev-agreement.html',
  'tailwind',
  7,
  36,
  '["238210","238220","484121","532120"]',
  '["GTA, CA","Vancouver, CA","Montreal, CA"]',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'government',
  'CHIPS Act Phase 2 — $39B Fab Disbursement',
  '$39B in CHIPS Act Phase 2 disbursements flowing to semiconductor fabs in AZ, OH, TX, NY. Creates sustained demand for industrial services within 50-mile radius: HVAC commercial, electrical contracting, machine shops, security services.',
  'Intel, TSMC, Samsung are building fabs the size of small cities. Every one of those sites needs HVAC, electrical, machine shop support, and security for the next decade. The contracts are already being let.',
  '["industrial_services","commercial_construction","security"]',
  'Prioritize NAICS 238220, 238210, 332710, 561612 targets within 50 miles of Phoenix AZ, Columbus OH, Austin TX, Albany NY fab corridors. These businesses will have government contract exposure without needing federal certification.',
  0.92,
  'https://www.commerce.gov/chips',
  'tailwind',
  9,
  48,
  '["238220","238210","332710","561612","238290"]',
  '["Phoenix, AZ","Columbus, OH","Austin, TX","Albany, NY"]',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'government',
  'IRA Energy Credits + USDA REAP Program Active',
  'USDA Rural Energy for America Program (REAP) providing grants and loan guarantees for rural small businesses implementing renewable energy or energy efficiency improvements. Stacks with IRA Section 48 investment tax credits.',
  'The government is paying rural service businesses to electrify their fleets and upgrade their HVAC. REAP grants cover up to 50% of project cost. This is not a subsidy — it is a capital stack lever that reduces buyer equity required.',
  '["hvac","fleet_services","rural_services"]',
  'Flag all rural-geography HVAC and fleet-dependent service businesses as REAP-eligible. Model REAP grant as a capital stack layer in STACK module — reduces buyer equity requirement by 15–30% on eligible deals.',
  0.88,
  'https://www.rd.usda.gov/programs-services/energy-programs/rural-energy-america-program-renewable-energy-systems-energy-efficiency',
  'tailwind',
  8,
  24,
  '["238220","484121","238910","561720"]',
  '["NC","SC","GA","FL","TN","TX","AZ"]',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'macro_momentum',
  'Sunbelt Migration Acceleration — IRS Flow Data',
  'IRS county-to-county flow data confirms sustained household inflow to FL, TX, NC, SC, TN, AZ. Net migration into Sunbelt metros accelerating post-2024. Creates sustained demand for residential and light-commercial trade services in those geographies.',
  'People are still moving to the Sunbelt. The IRS data is unambiguous. Every household that moves needs HVAC service, pest control, plumbing. The demand is structural, not cyclical.',
  '["trade_services","residential_services","commercial_services"]',
  'Weight Tier 1 geographies (NC, SC, GA, FL, TN, TX, AZ) at maximum in Continental Keystone pipeline. Prioritize businesses in high-inflow metros: Charlotte, Nashville, Tampa, Austin, Phoenix, Raleigh.',
  0.91,
  'https://www.irs.gov/statistics/soi-tax-stats-migration-data',
  'tailwind',
  9,
  60,
  '["238220","238210","561710","561720","238290"]',
  '["NC","SC","GA","FL","TN","TX","AZ"]',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'government',
  'USMCA Review 2026 — Chinese FDI Throttle Risk',
  'Scheduled USMCA review proceedings may restrict Mexican-domiciled Chinese FDI flow. Businesses with heavy concentration in Chinese-tenant industrial park exposure in Northern Mexico face regulatory headwind if review results in stricter rules-of-origin enforcement.',
  'The USMCA review is a hedge signal. If you are buying a service business that depends on Chinese-tenant industrial parks in Nuevo León, you need to know that the policy environment could shift. Diversification is the hedge.',
  '["industrial_services","logistics","commercial_real_estate"]',
  'Flag Tier 2 (Northern Mexico) targets with >50% revenue concentration from Chinese-tenant industrial parks. Require diversification evidence before advancing to deal room. Model USMCA headwind scenario in capital stack.',
  0.65,
  'https://ustr.gov/trade-agreements/free-trade-agreements/united-states-mexico-canada-agreement',
  'headwind',
  6,
  18,
  '["484121","561720","238220","238210"]',
  '["Nuevo León, MX","Coahuila, MX","Baja California, MX"]',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v1wvYFABP51Dvh.c007ac915537 --database GeCPeFFiEBRZFpk6xckkAz --execute
